steps.title: Find b from "320% greater than 160"
steps.content: "320% greater than 160" means take 160 and add 320% of 160 to it: $b = 160 + 3.2 \times 160 = 160(1 + 3.2) = 160 \times 4.2$. Computing, $160 \times 4.2 = 640 + 32 = 672$, so $b = 672$.

steps.title: Find a from "55% less than b"
steps.content: "55% less than $b$" means subtract 55% of $b$ from $b$: $a = b - 0.55b = 0.45b = 0.45 \times 672$. Computing, $0.45 \times 672 = 302.4 = \dfrac{1512}{5}$. Grid in 1512/5 (or 302.4).
